attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00045, derived from source AUC-045) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-RENAL-01 bucket.

Source note describes in-person IM ketorolac/ondansetron administration with objective pain-score improvement and a prescribed alpha-blocker course; telehealth reprojection replaces the IM analgesia with a recommendation for urgent in-person review for stronger/parenteral analgesia, and reframes the alpha-blocker as something the in-person assessing clinician should initiate rather than a telehealth-prescribed medication.

Vitals and physical exam (costovertebral angle tenderness, absence of peritonism) were clinician-obtained in person and were not placed in 01.objective_data_offered; sealed into 10/11 as telehealth-unobtainable.
Exact age not stated in source; a plausible adult age (38) consistent with renal colic epidemiology and 'partner present' framing was assigned as a conservative placeholder.
No guideline references were cited in the source note; guideline_references left as an empty array.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
